description_long: This clock tower features a dark, polished wooden structure with a gently arched roof and a prominent circular clock face on its front. The clock face is encased in glass and displays Roman numerals, with two black hands indicating the time. Flanking the clock face are two decorative wooden columns, adding a classical touch to the design. The sides and back of the tower are plain, with the wood showing a slightly weathered, glossy finish. The base is broad and sturdy, providing stability and a sense of permanence. The overall appearance is reminiscent of traditional mantel or civic clock towers, blending elegance with functional design.
description: A dark wooden clock tower with an arched roof, Roman numeral clock face, and decorative columns, finished in a glossy, slightly weathered style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular clock face with Roman numerals, glass cover, and two decorative columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure, the arched roof profile, and one of the columns.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned wooden surface and the full arch of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other column and the side profile of the roof.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is circular, encased in glass, and features black Roman numerals on a light background. It has two black hands (hour and minute) and a subtle ring marking the edge. The design is classic and minimal, with no additional decorative elements inside the face.
